task_description: Add input validation to the Step Functions state machine via a Choice state that checks file extensions, wire the Lambda handler to the AWS Lambda runtime API with validation logic, and update ARCHITECTURE.md to reflect the complete integrated pipeline.

verification.summary: All 36 CDK assertion tests pass (including new TestLambdaHasOutputBucketWritePermission). 12 Lambda handler unit tests pass. cdk synth succeeds. Review fixes applied: outputBucket.GrantWrite added, Lambda unit tests created, case-sensitivity design note documented.
